lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, realize that He is pervading in all bodies;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bhaj mere man gahir ganbheeraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O my soul, vibrate on the Profound, Unfathomable Lord. ||1||Pause||
One who dwells with the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day, is sanctified.
Loving devotion to the Lord brings endless waves of joy and delight.
The birth into the world of the faithless cynic is totally useless.
The humble devotee of the Lord remains unattached. ||2||
The body which sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord is sanctified.
The soul remains conscious of the Lord, absorbed in His Love.
My mind is totally content, imbued with my Beloved. ||3||
Those who speak and babble on and on, are truly dead.
The Lord is the Infinite Primal Being, beyond the beyond, the priceless jewel.
O Nanak, through the Guru's Teachings, I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||17||
I have seen that the whole world is engrossed in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤੂੰ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh door naahee prabh toon hai |
lines.english: God is not far away - O God, You are right here.
One is a beggar, living on charity;
another is a king, absorbed in himself.
Aasaa, First Mehl, Thi-Thukay:
One receives honor, and another dishonor.
The Lord destroys and creates; He is enshrined in His meditation.
So whom should I present to You? Who is good enough? ||1||
There is no other as great as You.
You are the Great Giver, the Doer, the Creator. ||1||Pause||
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is my only Support.
I have not walked on Your Path; I have followed the crooked path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਅੰਧੁਲਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa andhulaa maaeaa kaa bandh |
lines.english: I am mentally blind, in the bondage of Maya.
The wall of my body is breaking down, wearing away, growing weaker.
In the Court of the Lord, I find no place to sit.
Night and day they are blind - please, bless them with Your Light.
You have such high hopes of eating and living
They are drowning in the terrifying world-ocean, crying out in pain.
- your breaths and morsels of food are already counted! ||2||
Nanak utters this one prayer;
Hear and believe in the Name.
I am a sacrifice to those who chant,
Thus I find my seat in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaan tudh bhaavai taa duramat jaae |
lines.english: When it pleases You, evil-mindedness departs,
soul and body, all belong to You, Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਜਪੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaan toon dehi japee teraa naau |
lines.english: When You bless me, I chant Your Name.
Prays Nanak, carry us across the terrifying world-ocean. ||4||18||
When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, then one comes to meet the True Guru.
and the jewel of spiritual wisdom comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਧ ਬਿਨੁ ਧੇਨੁ ਪੰਖ ਬਿਨੁ ਪੰਖੀ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਕਾਮਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: dudh bin dhen pankh bin pankhee jal bin utabhuj kaam naahee |
lines.english: A cow without milk; a bird without wings; a garden without water - totally useless!
Aasaa, First Mehl, Panch-Padhay:
How could I ever forget You? It would be so painful!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਸੁਲਤਾਨੁ ਸਲਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਅੰਧੀ ਕੋਠੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kiaa sulataan salaam vihoonaa andhee kotthee teraa naam naahee |1|
lines.english: What is an emperor, without respect? The chamber of the soul is so dark, without the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਸਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dukh laagai toon visar naahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I would suffer such pain - no, I shall not forget You! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਜੀਭ ਰਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੰਨੀ ਪਵਣੁ ਨ ਵਾਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: akhee andh jeebh ras naahee kanee pavan na vaajai |
lines.english: The eyes grow blind, the tongue does not taste, and the ears do not hear any sound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਬਿਰਖ ਬਾਗ ਭੁਇ ਚੋਖੀ ਸਿੰਚਿਤ ਭਾਉ ਕਰੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: akhar birakh baag bhue chokhee sinchit bhaau karehee |
lines.english: The Word is the tree; the garden of the heart is the farm; tend it, and irrigate it with the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣੀ ਚਲੈ ਪਜੂਤਾ ਆਗੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਫਲ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: charanee chalai pajootaa aagai vin sevaa fal laage |2|
lines.english: He walks on his feet only when supported by someone else; without serving the Lord, such are the fruits of life. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਫਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਏਕੋ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕੈਸੇ ਲੇਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa fal laagai naam eko bin karamaa kaise lehee |3|
lines.english: All these trees bear the fruit of the Name of the One Lord; but without the karma of good actions, how can anyone obtain it? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਵਿਣੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਫਲੁ ਕਿਸੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jete jeea tete sabh tere vin sevaa fal kisai naahee |
lines.english: As many living beings are there are, they are all Yours. Without selfless service, no one obtains any reward.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੈਸਾ ਜਾ ਜੀਵਾ ਤਾਂ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: mat vich maran jeevan hor kaisaa jaa jeevaa taan jugat naahee |
lines.english: To die in the Teachings is to live. Otherwise, what is life? That is not the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ਰਹੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh bhaanaa teraa hovai vin naavai jeeo rahai naahee |4|
lines.english: Pain and pleasure come by Your Will; without the Name, the soul does not even exist. ||4||
